title: Are Exuberant Markets Ignoring Risks
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
Markets rallied on relief from the Middle East, but trade challenges are just around the corner. The Fed is now projected to cut rates in September and later in the year, but investors should not put all their faith in those forecasts as inflation lurks. The dollar's move may become the most important determinant of financial performance this year.
